verses.text: Vantungah a ompa aw, nangmah kong ento hi
Nasem pasalte in a topa uh muang a, nasem numeite in a tonu uh a muan' mah bangin ko tungah hehpihna nong neih matengin Topa kote' Pasian kong mitsuan uh hi
Kote hong hehpih in. Topa aw, kote hong hehpih in. Bang hang hiam cih leh kote in ka thuak zawhloh uh simmawhna ka thuak uh hi
A ut-utin a gamta mite in kote a hong zahkona, a kiphasak mite in hong simmawh bawlna hangin ka gimthuakna uh sauvei lua khinta hi.
